def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) for per-code rolling/lag operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # delay(close, 7)
    close_lag7 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=7)

    # delta(close, 7) = close - delay(close, 7)
    delta_close_7 = pl.col('close') - close_lag7

    # (close - delay(close, 7)) + delta(close, 7)
    inner = (pl.col('close') - close_lag7) + delta_close_7

    # -1 * sign(...)
    neg_sign = -1 * inner.sign()

    # sum(returns, 250) -> rolling sum over 250 periods
    sum_ret_250 = rolling_sum(pl.col('returns'), window=250)

    # 1 + rank(1 + sum(returns, 250))  (cross-sectional rank per date)
    rhs = 1 + rank(1 + sum_ret_250).over('date')

    # Final factor
    factor = neg_sign * rhs

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
